visits.note: Patient presents with new onset of type 2 diabetes, hypertension, and hyperlipidemia. HbA1c is elevated at 7.8, BP is 145/95, and LDL is 145. Starting metformin 500mg twice daily and atorvastatin 20mg daily. Also starting losartan 50mg daily for hypertension.

Patient returns 6 months after initial visit with improved HbA1c to 6.9 but worsening BP to 155/100. LDL has decreased to 115. Adding hydrochlorothiazide 25mg daily to losartan for hypertension and increasing atorvastatin to 40mg daily. Also starting glipizide 5mg daily for diabetes.

Patient returns 5 months after previous visit with worsening BP to 160/105 and slight increase in HbA1c to 7.2. eGFR has decreased to 68. Adding telmisartan 40mg daily to losartan for hypertension and increasing glipizide to 10mg daily for diabetes.
medications: Losartan 50mg daily + Hydrochlorothiazide 25mg daily + Telmisartan 40mg daily

visits.note: Patient returns 7 months after previous visit with improved HbA1c to 6.5 but worsening BP to 165/110. LDL has decreased to 100. Adding spironolactone 25mg daily for hypertension and increasing glipizide to 15mg daily for diabetes.
medications: Losartan 50mg daily + Hydrochlorothiazide 25mg daily + Telmisartan 40mg daily + Spironolactone 25mg daily
